title: Feedback
description: A structured evaluation record for one or more Log10 completions.

id.description: The unique identifier for this feedback.

created_at_ms.description: Unix epoch timestamp (milliseconds) when this feedback was created.

task_id.description: The FeedbackTask identifier that defines the scoring schema for this feedback.

json_values.description: The scored values for this feedback, conforming to the FeedbackTask json_schema.

matched_completion_ids.description: Identifiers of completions associated with this feedback.

comment.description: Free-text reviewer comment accompanying the scored feedback.

completions_summary.description: AI-generated summary of the completions evaluated in this feedback record.
